calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion (Motions)
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Credit Glory, LLC and Credit Glory, Inc.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Gomez and Deputy Jones; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:55:16 a.m., pausing at 10:05:08 a.m., resuming at 10:10:25 a.m. and concluding at 10:25:30 a.m. (D505)

Bryan McCormack, Esq. representing Plaintiff Soutrik Pramanik who was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Credit Glory, LLC and Credit Glory, Inc. not appearing.

2nd Amended Complaint filed Dec-22-2023.
Proof of service as to Defendants filed on May-03-2024.
Default entered on Oct-15-2024.
Dismissal of the Doe and remaining Defendants filed Oct-15-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

The court denies the request for pre-judgment interest.

Counsel confirms to the Court that the request for judgment shall resolve the entire case.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

Damages $378,000.05
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $26,312.50
Costs $1,623.55
Total Judgment $405,936.10

Proposed judgment as amended signed and executed this day.
